recommendations.title: One Nation, One King
recommendations.overview: „Un peuple et son roi" crosses the destinies of the men and women of the population, and those of historical figures. Their meeting place is the newly founded National Assembly. At the heart of the story lie the fate of the king and the birth of the

recommendations.title: Titicut Follies
recommendations.overview: A stark and graphic portrayal of the conditions that existed at the State Prison for the Criminally Insane at Bridgewater, Massachusetts, and documents the various ways the inmates are treated by the guards, social workers, and psychiatrists.

recommendations.title: Against the Ice
recommendations.overview: In 1909, two explorers fight to survive after they're left behind while on a Danish expedition in ice-covered Greenland.

recommendations.title: Godland
recommendations.overview: In the late 19th century, a young Danish priest travels to a remote part of Iceland to build a church and photograph its people. But the deeper he goes into the unforgiving landscape, the more he strays from his purpose, the mission and morality.

recommendations.title: RRR
recommendations.overview: A fictional history of two legendary revolutionaries' journey away from home before they began fighting for their country in the 1920s.

recommendations.title: Ran
recommendations.overview: Shakespeare's King Lear is reimagined as a singular historical epic set in sixteenth-century Japan where an aging warlord divides his kingdom between his three sons.

recommendations.title: April 9th
recommendations.overview: In the early morning of April 9, 1940, the Danish army is alerted: the Germans have crossed the border.

recommendations.title: The Passion of the Christ
recommendations.overview: A graphic portrayal of the last twelve hours of Jesus of Nazareth's life.

recommendations.title: House of Wax
recommendations.overview: A sculptor opens a wax museum to showcase the likenesses of famous historical figures, but quickly runs into trouble when his business partner demands the exhibits become more extreme in order to increase profits.

recommendations.title: Zeitgeist: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A documentary examining possible historical and modern conspiracies surrounding Christianity, the 9/11 terrorist attacks, and the Federal Reserve bank.
